positive: A central, stylized illustration of a whimsical celestial forest meeting a bioluminescent coral reef. The scene features stylized, floating megaflora with glowing purple and teal accents, intermingling with graceful, silhouetted sea life like stylized manta rays and neon jellyfish. The composition should be symmetrical and highly detailed, designed for high-contrast apparel printing. Use an Art Deco botanical style mixed with magical realism. Palette focus: Deep indigo, vibrant cyan, electric violet, and stark black silhouettes. Lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, emanating from the 'bioluminescent' elements. Ideal for repeating, circular print placement. Highly rendered, vector art quality, thick linework, high contrast, flat color blocking suitable for silkscreen printing.
negative: blurry, grain, photo, realistic, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, deformed, mutated, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly rendered, low resolution, bad composition
